reviews.review_description:
Cool app but literally lies to you about forklift facts. Will tell you that the mast is powered by 2 or more hydraulic pumps in one part, then quiz you on the very same fact with a true or false option and when you say that it's true you're wrong?! Wtf!? Horrible price for an app that doesn't know forklift facts correctly.

Also, it gets to a point where you are supposed to "pull forward slowly and position a pallet, there's no pallet, and I've been stuck on that part for 2 days trying to figure it out 

Then, there is the  narration not matching up with all the text during the learning of the various parts of the lift. That is super annoying.

The driving simulation itself is excellent, although the steering wheel a bit glitchy sometimes and hard to grab. 

Only has one main driving exercise and no freestyle practice. Expected it to have more scenarios, like lifting a pallet to a high shelf etc. Also practise mode and exam mode appear to be identical and neither give a score on how well you did. 

Should also have option for free movement and smooth turning for those used to VR. 

Does a great job at teaching you drive but not really worth the price tag. You’re not likely to run through it more than three times.

My Grandson is really grateful that he completed the first phase of the Forklift simulation. An employer hired him full time. Thank you for developing this great app. He will complete the remaining phases.
